stemHtml:
When supersonic airflow passes through a normal shock wave, how do the following conditions change?

I. static pressure
II. density
III. local speed of sound

options.a: I. static pressure increases, II. density increases, III. local speed of sound increases
options.b: I. static pressure decreases, II. density decreases, III. local speed of sound decreases
options.c: I. static pressure increases, II. density increases, III. local speed of sound decreases
options.d: I. static pressure remains constant, II. density decreases, III. local speed of sound increases
